reviews.author: Tushar Sharma
reviews.review_body: Khaitan Public School is an exceptional educational institution that excels in providing a well-rounded education. With a dedicated faculty, modern infrastructure, and a student-centric approach, the school ensures academic excellence and holistic development. The wide range of co-curricular activities allows students to explore their talents and develop essential life skills. Overall, Khaitan Public School stands as a beacon of quality education, preparing students for success in the future.

reviews.author: Shalinikalla Bansal
reviews.review_body: Khaitan Public School stands tall among the best schools of the area. The amenities and infrastructure , school has is upto the mark. Staff is well qualified and well trained. School pays proper attention on the overall development of its students. Sports and other co curricular activities are an integral part of the process.

reviews.author: nidhi varshney
reviews.review_body: My daughter studying here since 5 years. But right after corona they have turned in to a business rather than a school of education.price  Hike in fees hike in book sets but there is no hike in there standards of studies no substitute for the subjects if a teacher is absent. Even when the things comes on to visual and performing arts students spent their periods either watching senior kids performances or as a free period. Due to their extra curriculums I chose this school. My Last year was full of complaints but I guess in this year they are doing the same. They are busy in snaching money from our pockets rather than looking for our kids bright future.

reviews.author: Amiya Mohan
reviews.review_body: This is an amazing school with best of the facilities. The teachers are super qualified and kids are taken care of by the staff as if they are their own kids. Academics is the strongest part.  Syllabus is finished on time and teachers pay extra attention to make the kids understand the concept. Five stars.

reviews.author: Alokananda awasthi
reviews.review_body: Academically, KPS has an impressive track record with a high percentage of students passing the board exams with flying colours. The school also lays emphasis on co-curricular activities and offers a wide range of sports, music, dance, and other extracurricular activities. I was very impressed with the way students are groomed in this school.
